'''Sutu''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] who served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], he was assigned aboard the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Imperator (Imperial-class)|''Imperator'']] where he served as a [[Scout/Legends|scout]] in the platoon, led by [[Cadet Leader]] [[Kyle Katarn]]. He was killed during an [[Battle of AX-456|attack]] on [[AX-456]].
